title: Vietnamese Pork Belly Bowl
description: A flavorful and aromatic Vietnamese-inspired dish featuring tender pork belly, served in a bowl with caramelized vegetables and herbs.
instructions: Season the pork belly with fish sauce, sugar, garlic, and ginger.
Place the pork belly in a baking dish and roast for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced bell peppers and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the caramelized onions and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the pork belly from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the pork belly into thin strips.
Serve the pork belly on a bed of the bell pepper mixture, garnished with herbs.
